_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_28_note: Session 28 (2026-05-27): MRVL event-driven deep session — Q1 FY2027 actuals confirmed: EPS $0.80 (beat $0.79), revenue ~$2.40B at guidance midpoint; FY2027 approaching $11B, FY2028 ~$15B reaffirmed. DCF re-run: IV $119.16 (MoS -44.5%, SELL/AVOID). Major gap filled: NVIDIA $2B investment in Marvell via NVLink Fusion (March 31, 2026) — was in Growth Drivers but absent from Recent Updates. Jensen Huang + Matt Murphy joint Computex keynote confirmed June 2, 10:30am Taipei ('The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'). Session 27 error corrected: '13-15% after-hours surge' was from March 2026 Q4 FY2026 event, not May 27 Q1 FY2027. ASML MATCH Act (April 7) DUV servicing ban captured; stock -2.7% to $1,587. MU extended to $962.50 (+7.4%). ALAB Computex June 3 press conference confirmed. Phases 1b/1c gated (27%6=3). Session 29 PRIORITY: NVDA GTC Taipei keynote June 1 — Vera Rubin production ramp, CoWoS-L, HBM4 supply; update NVDA entity. Then MRVL+NVDA joint keynote June 2 — NVLink Fusion details. Then ALAB June 3 — Scorpio X + PCIe 6 demo outcome.

event_queue.event: GTC Taipei keynote June 1, 11am Taipei time — Vera Rubin production ramp, CoWoS-L allocation, HBM4 supply timeline. Session 29: update NVDA entity post-keynote. Key watch: (1) Vera Rubin production cut context (2M→1.5M — confirm or revise); (2) NVLink Fusion product details pre-joint-keynote with MRVL.

Joint Computex keynote with Jensen Huang (NVDA) June 2, 10:30am Taipei — 'The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity'. NVLink Fusion product details. Session 29/30: update MRVL entity after keynote. Watch: any new design win announcements, optical connectivity product reveals, FY2027 guidance commentary.

Computex press conference June 3, 10:00am Taipei — first live Scorpio X 320 Lane demo + PCIe 6 scale-up optics. Session 29/30: update ALAB entity. Watch: (1) Amazon Trainium3 production scale confirmation; (2) any new hyperscaler design win commentary; (3) differentiation vs. MRVL NVLink Fusion narrative from June 2. No DCF re-run until outcome known.

price +3.19% to $158.68 on May 26 (actual confirmed close; prior sessions used stale $137.53). MoS corrected to -19.7% at $158.01 May 27. SELL/AVOID. DCF last run May 22 (<30 days). No re-run required; price correction captured in dashboard.

price +7.4% to $962.50 on May 27 (continuation of UBS $1,625 upgrade momentum). MoS deepened to -54.0%. DCF run May 26 (<30 days). No re-run required; next catalyst is Q3 FY2026 earnings (~June 25). Monitor for any guidance revision or Samsung supply disruption.
